content:
Neptune in Capricorn: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Neptune in Capricorn blends the archetypal drive of Neptune (where you dream, dissolve boundaries, and seek the transcendent) with the Earth, cardinal nature of Capricorn.

  • Planet: Neptune — dreams, imagination, spirituality, illusion, compassion
  • Sign: Capricorn (Earth/Cardinal) — ambition, structure, responsibility, discipline, achievement

Eastern Perspective

Parallel Eastern reference (not historical correspondence): 七曜 (Seven Luminaries: Sun/Moon + Mars=火/水/木/金/土 五星 mapped to 火曜/水曜/木曜/金曜/土曜). Use as parallel frame only, not as Western-Eastern historical equivalence.
